overview.description: The LifeX 2065 Longevity Income ETF (LFBE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund actively manages US Treasury exposure, aiming to provide predictable cashflows through 2065. The fund is designed to appeal to investors born in 1965 and reaching age 100. LFBE was launched on Jan 6, 2025 and is issued by Stone Ridge.
